name: inspire-ai
description: Inspire AI — Data Strategy Copilot powered by Databricks

scripts.postinstall: if [ ! -d backend/node_modules ]; then cd backend && npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund; fi
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
